/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdro_hg__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so -o libdro_hg__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so CMakeFiles/dro_hg__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/dro_hg/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/motor_cmd__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dro_hg__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/dro_hg/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/motor_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dro_hg__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/dro_hg/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/arm_cmd__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dro_hg__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/dro_hg/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/arm_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dro_hg__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/dro_hg/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/leg_cmd__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dro_hg__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/dro_hg/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/leg_state__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
